entities.name: rs4988235

entities.name: Lactase Enzyme
entities.context: Enzyme whose production decreases in adulthood for those with intolerant genotype

entities.name: Gut Microbiome
entities.context: May compensate for lactose intolerance, explaining absence of symptoms in some carriers
